'''chozathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lygosomine|lygosomine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-z-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lygosomine|lygosomine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chozathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozathithi|chozathithi]] || [[word:chozathiji|chozathiji]] || [[word:chozathishi|chozathishi]] || [[word:chozathiki|chozathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozathuthuthu|chozathuthuthu]] || [[word:chozathujuju|chozathujuju]] || [[word:chozathushushu|chozathushushu]] || [[word:chozathukuku|chozathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozathuthu|chozathuthu]] || [[word:chozathuju|chozathuju]] || [[word:chozathushu|chozathushu]] || [[word:chozathuku|chozathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozathufthuf|chozathufthuf]] || [[word:chozathufjuf|chozathufjuf]] || [[word:chozathufshuf|chozathufshuf]] || [[word:chozathufkuf|chozathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozathethe|chozathethe]] || [[word:chozatheje|chozatheje]] || [[word:chozatheshe|chozatheshe]] || [[word:chozatheke|chozatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozathothotho|chozathothotho]] || [[word:chozathojojo|chozathojojo]] || [[word:chozathoshosho|chozathoshosho]] || [[word:chozathokoko|chozathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozathotho|chozathotho]] || [[word:chozathojo|chozathojo]] || [[word:chozathosho|chozathosho]] || [[word:chozathoko|chozathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozathofthof|chozathofthof]] || [[word:chozathofjof|chozathofjof]] || [[word:chozathofshof|chozathofshof]] || [[word:chozathofkof|chozathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfthĂŻf|chozathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfjĂŻf|chozathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfshĂŻf|chozathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfkĂŻf|chozathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chozathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chozathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chozathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chozathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfthĂŻf|chozathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfjĂŻf|chozathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfshĂŻf|chozathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfkĂŻf|chozathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfthĂŻf|chozathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfjĂŻf|chozathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfshĂŻf|chozathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozathĂŻfkĂŻf|chozathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozathĂŠthĂŠ|chozathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chozathĂŠjĂŠ|chozathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chozathĂŠshĂŠ|chozathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chozathĂŠkĂŠ|chozathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozathathatha|chozathathatha]] || [[word:chozathajaja|chozathajaja]] || [[word:chozathashasha|chozathashasha]] || [[word:chozathakaka|chozathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozathatha|chozathatha]] || [[word:chozathaja|chozathaja]] || [[word:chozathasha|chozathasha]] || [[word:chozathaka|chozathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozathafthaf|chozathafthaf]] || [[word:chozathafjaf|chozathafjaf]] || [[word:chozathafshaf|chozathafshaf]] || [[word:chozathafkaf|chozathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chozathasha|chozathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chozathshĂ«asha|chozathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chozathroasha|chozathroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chozathmuasha|chozathmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chozathyaasha|chozathyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochozathnkshĂ«asha|gochozathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochozathnkroasha|gochozathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochozathnkmuasha|gochozathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochozathnkyaasha|gochozathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chozazathasha|chozazathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chozazathshĂ«asha|chozazathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chozazathroasha|chozazathroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chozazathmuasha|chozazathmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chozazathyaasha|chozazathyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochozazathnkshĂ«asha|gochozazathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochozazathnkroasha|gochozazathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochozazathnkmuasha|gochozazathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochozazathnkyaasha|gochozazathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chezĂŠthasha|chezĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chezĂŠthshĂ«asha|chezĂŠthshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chezĂŠthroasha|chezĂŠthroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chezĂŠthmuasha|chezĂŠthmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chezĂŠthyaasha|chezĂŠthyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochezĂŠthnkshĂ«asha|gochezĂŠthnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochezĂŠthnkroasha|gochezĂŠthnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochezĂŠthnkmuasha|gochezĂŠthnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochezĂŠthnkyaasha|gochezĂŠthnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chozfathasha|chozfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chozfathshĂ«asha|chozfathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chozfathroasha|chozfathroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chozfathmuasha|chozfathmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chozfathyaasha|chozfathyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochozfathnkshĂ«asha|gochozfathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochozfathnkroasha|gochozfathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochozfathnkmuasha|gochozfathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochozfathnkyaasha|gochozfathnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
